scripts.predev: node -e "const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); try { const pids = execSync('lsof -ti tcp:3000,tcp:3001,tcp:3002', { encoding: 'utf8', stdio: ['ignore', 'pipe', 'ignore'] }).trim(); if (pids) { execSync('kill ' + pids.split(/\s+/).join(' ')); } } catch {}"
scripts.dev: REMOTE_MODE=preview concurrently "npm run build:watch --workspace=loans-console" "sh -c 'until [ -f loans-console/dist/remoteEntry.js ]; do sleep 1; done; npm run preview --workspace=loans-console'" "npm run build:watch --workspace=investments-console" "sh -c 'until [ -f investments-console/dist/remoteEntry.js ]; do sleep 1; done; npm run preview --workspace=investments-console'" "npm run dev --workspace=core-banking-system"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=loans-console && npm run build --workspace=investments-console && npm run build --workspace=core-banking-system
scripts.preview: concurrently "npm run preview --workspace=loans-console" "npm run preview --workspace=investments-console" "npm run preview --workspace=core-banking-system"
